rationale: Scope fence holds on every axis. `git show --name-only 52d052d0` lists exactly the 3 expected files: plugins/mindspec/workflows/ms-panel.js, .claude/workflows/ms-panel.js, plugins/mindspec/workflow_test.go. Exactly one commit past base (parent 2ad9bc56, the R1 merge commit) — no extra commits on the bead branch. `git diff 52d052d0^ 52d052d0` shows the only substantive change in each ms-panel.js copy is the SHELL_METACHAR_RE literal (/[\x60;|&\n]|\$\(/ -> /[\x60;|&\n$]/) plus a new explanatory comment above it — no other line in the 500+ line workflow is touched. workflow_test.go's diff is purely additive: one new test function appended, nothing pre-existing modified. cmp confirms the two ms-panel.js copies remain byte-identical mirrors. `git status` is clean (nothing to commit, working tree clean). No stray files, no absorbed R1/R3/R4 work, no unrelated edits.
